title: Corrective fix for B0047: Review TUI Operator Actions V1
description:
Blocked reason: Review did not pass: retry lacks the confirmation required by the operator-actions spec, and the in-app help text is out of sync with the implemented/documented shortcuts.

Remaining work: Implementation needs a developer follow-up to add retry confirmation or align the spec if immediate retry is intentional, and to bring the help overlay plus regression coverage back in sync with the actual keybindings.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0047.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Implemented a pending-retry confirmation state in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py` so `t` now requests retry, `y` confirms it, `n` cancels it, and timed refreshes clear stale retry confirmations when the bead is no longer blocked. Updated the help overlay plus README/spec shortcut text, and added regression tests covering retry confirmation, cancellation, refresh clearing, pending-state interaction, and keyboard execution.
handoff_summary.remaining: Parent bead B0047 can be retried by rerunning review against the updated TUI/runtime/docs behavior.
handoff_summary.risks: Low: `y` now routes through a shared confirm action for retry and status-update flows, so future pending-action additions should preserve the mutual-exclusion rules in `TuiRuntimeState`.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry the B0047 review bead now that retry confirmation, help text, and regression coverage are back in sync.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Shared TUI pending-action logic changed in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`; downstream edits in the same runtime state machine or `tests/test_tui.py` should account for the new retry-confirmation fields and the `y` confirm dispatch.

conflict_risks: Shared TUI pending-action logic changed in `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`; downstream edits in the same runtime state machine or `tests/test_tui.py` should account for the new retry-confirmation fields and the `y` confirm dispatch.

execution_history.summary: Added retry confirmation to the TUI operator flow, synchronized in-app help and docs with the active shortcuts, and extended TUI regression coverage.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
